vibe: Calm, supportive, human, minimal hype, grounded.

scale.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-primary dark:text-primary

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, optical alignment, calm flow.

surfaces.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#071410]/70 border border-black/5 dark:border-white/10
surfaces.soft_card: bg-white dark:bg-[#0F291E] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] dark:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.2)] rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] p-8 md:p-12 border border-black/5 dark:border-white/5

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-base font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary dark:bg-secondary text-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-base font-medium transition-all

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glass surface. Logo left, center links (desktop), right CTA.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Form, Input. Override with: rounded-full px-6 py-4 bg-white dark:bg-black/20 border-border focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary
components.badges: rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium bg-accent text-accent-foreground border border-accent/20

hero.content: H1 title, subheadline, dual CTAs (Waitlist email input + App Store buttons).
hero.visual: A beautifully crafted CSS/HTML phone mockup holding a 'Night Fuel' or 'Weekly Wrap' UI. Background layered with a soft abstract green gradient texture.

problem.vibe: Deep empathy. Soft muted background (bg-accent dark:bg-accent/10).
problem.layout: Centered large typographic statement (H2) about burnout, followed by a 3-column subtle text-heavy grid explaining the 'hustle culture' issue.

how_it_works.layout: Vertical timeline or overlapping bento. 1. Night Fuel (dark/moody card). 2. Daily Action (bright/active card). 3. Weekly Wrap (calm/reflective card).

features.layout: Tetris Bento grid. A mix of col-span-8 and col-span-4 cards. Features: Nightly Quotes, Task Time-blocking, Energy Check-ins, Wins Jar, Gentle Recovery.

emotional_hook.visual: Full-width section with the zen stones image spanning the background. Dark overlay (bg-black/40).
emotional_hook.content: Centered text: 'Productivity through well-being, not pressure.' large serif text in white.

social_proof.layout: Grid of soft cards containing testimonials from freelancers and young professionals. Include avatar images.

cta_final.layout: Centered card with glassmorphism or soft background gradient. Waitlist form + store buttons.

footer.layout: Clean, minimal. Privacy-first messaging ('We respect your mind and your data.').

hero_background_gradient.description: Abstract green blurred background used to give the hero section a calm vibe.

night_fuel_theme.description: Crescent moon glowing. Use in the 'Night Fuel' feature card.

emotional_hook_bg.description: Stacked zen stones. Use as a full-width background for the emotional hook quote section.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons have subtle scale (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase. Cards have soft border glow or slight lift.
motion_and_interactions.entrances: Framer motion fade-up for section contents on scroll.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., 'hero-waitlist-form', 'theme-toggle-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Fraunces and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely exclusively on the URLs provided in the media section.
Implement a light/dark mode toggle (theme provider).
Build the phone mockup using raw Tailwind/CSS rather than an image to allow dynamic content (like dark mode UI inside the phone).
Use standard SVG icons (e.g., Lucide or Phosphor) for the App Store and Play Store buttons, avoiding raster placeholders.
Use standard Shadcn components for forms, but override their styles to match the 'soft_card' and 'glass' aesthetic.
